_comment: OPT-IN strict layer: model-judged deep review at every Stop via an experimental agent hook. Adds latency + tokens each code turn. Merge this Stop hook IN ADDITION to settings.snippet.json when you want hook-enforced AI review (not just the deterministic gate). Agent hooks are experimental.

hooks.prompt: Review ONLY the code changed in this turn. First get the changed files (e.g. `cat "$HOME/.claude/review-state/"*.changed` then `git diff -- <files>` or read them). Check four dimensions: (1) correctness & logic, edge cases, error handling; (2) security — injection, secrets/keys, unsafe exec/eval, path traversal, OWASP; (3) fake-run / over-claims — any 'it works / tests pass / results show X' must be backed by a real run; (4) test adequacy and fit with surrounding code conventions. If there is a genuine blocking issue, return {"ok": false, "reason": "<specific, numbered findings and how to fix>"}. If the changes are clean, or there are no code changes this turn, return {"ok": true}. Block only on real problems; once they are addressed, return ok:true so the session is not wedged.
